subject: RE: Presentation to Trading Track A&A
body:
Ina,
Can you please forward the presentation to Mog.
Phillip

cc:
Subject:        RE: Presentation to Trading Track A&A
Hi Philip
If you do have slides preapred,, can you have your assistant e:mail a copy to Mog Heu, who will conference in from New York.
Thanks, karen
-----Original Message-----
From:   Allen, Phillip
Sent:   Wednesday, April 18, 2001 10:30 AM
To:     Buckley, Karen
Subject:        Re: Presentation to Trading Track A&A
The topic will the the western natural gas market.  I may have overhead slides.  I will bring handouts.
